meta.title: How-to Guide | ZoneHub
meta.description: Complete guide for Steam profile customization: basics, themes, showcases.

intro.title: 🎯 Getting Started
intro.welcome: Welcome to ZoneHub! This is a powerful Steam profile customization tool that lets you preview and design your profile page before publishing so you can see the final result.

quickStart.title: ⚡ Quick Start (3 steps)
steps: On the homepage, click the blue "Edit" button (top right) to enter edit mode
Add and reorder showcases (Workshop, badges, artwork, etc.)
Customize avatar, background, and theme, then preview and copy to Steam
quickStart.footnote: See below for detailed steps and screenshots for each feature.

ch1.title: Basic Setup
ch1.editButtonBody: Find the blue "Edit" button in the top right corner of the page and click to enter edit mode.
ch1.editModeBody: After entering "Edit" mode, you can add, delete, and adjust the order of your showcases.
ch1.showcaseTypesIntro: Currently supports the following showcase types to help you create a personalized profile page.
showcaseItems: Custom text box: Add personal descriptions and introductions
Workshop showcase: Preview quintuple-split images here (local editing)
Recent activity: Simulates Steam's recent activity showcase with free game news
Featured artwork showcase: Upload and display a featured artwork image
Custom section: A customizable text area, just like Steam showcases
Badge collector: Display badges in 1×6 or 2×6 layout
Collected guides (Record): Vinyl-record-style showcases with multiple record styles and one-click player text copy
ch1.imgEditButtonCaption: Edit button location — blue edit button in the top right corner
ch1.imgEditModeCaption: Edit mode demo — click Edit to design your profile layout

ch2.title: Avatar & Personalization
ch2.personalizationIntro: The following personalization options are available to make your profile stand out.
ch2.previewBody: Below is a demo of avatar and nickname settings.

ch3.title: Badge Display & Settings
ch3.headerBody: Click the badge area on the profile header to open BadgePicker. Filter by color group or search by name in the top-right input. Steps: enter edit mode → click badge image → search/select badge → confirm.
ch3.pickerBody: In edit mode, add a "Badge Picker" showcase, then click it to choose badges.
ch3.imgCollectorBadgeAlt: Badge settings in badge picker showcase

ch4.title: Background & Themes
ch4.builtinIntro: We include many backgrounds and themes so you can simulate a real Steam profile page and design a better home page.

ch5.title: Artwork Showcase Tools
ch5.videoGifIntro: Convert video to quintuple-split GIFs for Steam Workshop uploads.

ch6.tagsIntro: In comments, custom sections, and profile description, you can use:

ch7.title: More
ch7.wipBody: More features are on the way — stay tuned!

support.freeNote: ZoneHub is completely free to use. If you enjoy this project, consider supporting my work.
